headline: SYSCO CORP (NYSE:SYY): A Strong Dividend Play With Sustainable Payout and Solid Profitability
summary: Screen dividend stocks using ChartMill ratings: find reliable income with Sysco Corp, offering a 3.01% yield, strong profitability (7/10), and sustainable 56% payout ratio at a reasonable valuation.
